candidate_definitions.text: kapture is a file format as well as a set of tools for manipulating datasets, and in particular Visual Localization and Structure from Motion data.

[build-system] requires = ["setuptools", "setuptools-scm"] build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta" [project] name = "kapture" description = "Kapture is a pivot file format and Python toolkit for SfM and sensor-acquired data." readme = "README.md" version="1.1.12" dependencies = …
